title: 7 Stocks to Buy This Week
text: For those looking for solid ideas regarding stocks to buy this week, Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell provided excellent material. In his annual Jackson Hole, Wyoming, policy speech, Powell stated that higher interest rates will persist for a while.

title: Glenn Greenberg Is Going All In on This Subprime Lending Giant

title: My 6 Warren Buffett-Inspired Insurance Picks
text: Growing interest rates are a major tailwind for insurers. It is not accidental that Warren Buffett recently made a big insurance acquisition after a long dry spell. Even at low interest rates, six insurers presented have delivered index-beating returns.

title: Progressive Announces Quarterly Common and Preferred Share Dividends
text: MAYFIELD VILLAGE, OHIO, Aug. 08, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- On August 5, 2022, the Board of Directors of The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) declared a $0.10 per common share dividend, payable October 14, 2022, to shareholders of record at the close of business on October 7, 2022 (ex-dividend date of October 6, 2022).
